name: streambridge
description: A privacy-conscious Chrome and Firefox extension for finding verified stream URLs.

scripts.lint:webext: npm run build && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox --pretty
scripts.test:e2e: npm run fixtures && npm run build && playwright test
scripts.stress:control: npm run fixtures && npm run build && node scripts/stress-streams.mjs --suite control
scripts.stress:public: npm run fixtures && npm run build && node scripts/stress-streams.mjs --suite public
scripts.stress:live: npm run build && node scripts/stress-streams.mjs --suite missav && node scripts/stress-streams.mjs --suite supjav
scripts.stress:android: npm run fixtures && npm run build && node scripts/stress-android.mjs
scripts.stress: npm run stress:control && npm run stress:public && npm run stress:live
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run lint:webext && npm run test:e2e && npm run assets:check && npm run release:check && npm run package && npm run test:package
